artifact_contract: Compact downstream model-form decision table for boundary/HX/wall-layer/radiation choices.
key_decisions: Property lane decisions are separated from friction, K, Nu, UA, HX, and radiation fitting.
Reis/Jadyn replication property mode is admitted as the replication lane; updated property sources are reference or sensitivity lanes until declared reruns.
VDI Heat Atlas and Reis solidification/failure evidence are admitted as heat-path architecture, not as one global UA.
Current CFD rcExternalTemperature radiation is embedded in realized wallHeatFlux; do not add a separate radiation term in realized-wallHeatFlux replay.
Chen et al. 2017 low-Re molten-salt mixed-convection Nu is rejected for current Salt2/3/4 active promotion because audited TAMU rows are outside or unknown.
Named pressure losses and CFD validity diagnostics are admitted method gates; universal f_D, K, and Nu names are rejected where section-effective flags apply.
